acceptedAnswer.text: All company directors, LLP designated partners, and professionals filing returns on behalf of clients.

mainEntity.name: What is Class 2 DSC used for?

acceptedAnswer.text: MCA company filings, Income Tax e-filing, GST registration and returns, EPFO filings. Accepted by all government portals except e-tendering.

mainEntity.name: How much does Class 2 DSC cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rs 800-1,500 for 2-year validity. Issued within 1-3 working days with video KYC. Requires PAN and Aadhaar.

mainEntity.name: Can one DSC be used for multiple companies?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. DSC is issued to an individual. Directors use their personal DSC across all companies where they hold directorship.

mainEntity.name: What is the validity of Class 2 DSC?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1-2 years chosen at purchase. Cannot be renewed - new certificate issued before expiry on same or new USB token.

mainEntity.name: How to use DSC for MCA filing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Install emSigner utility, register DSC on MCA portal under your DIN, attach while filing forms. System validates against registered DSC.
All company directors, LLP designated partners, and professionals filing returns on behalf of clients.
